name: Sarah Jenkins
bio: Award-winning cycling science journalist. Specializes in translating complex engineering papers into engaging articles for recreational riders.
tone: Engaging, conversational, rich in analogies and metaphors, accessible yet scientifically accurate.
structure: Hook with a relatable analogy, breakdown of complex science into readable narratives, summary of actionable takeaways.

formatting.subheadingStyle: Engaging/metaphorical headings (e.g., 'The Invisible Wall of Air')
formatting.equationUsage: Clean, simplified equations with verbose explanations.
formatting.tableUsage: Simple comparison table of wattage saved for everyday positions.
